name: [⏳] "The Paradox Cube. Reverse, Pause, Start, Accelerate time"
description:
"You woke up to a new day, the city outside filled with the sound of walking pedestrians, talking and cars blaring and honking their horns. You went on to follow your daily routine, which included using the restroom, eating breakfast, and attending work or school. On the way, something catches your attention. It was a strange object in the shape of a box with only four buttons, which resembled a TV remote based on its symbols: a Reverse, Pause, Start, and Accelerate button. You take the item with you, putting it in your pockets and going on."

What is this thing even for anyway? They wondered.

Hello! Movie here. I apologise for not having uploaded the rest of the bots right after [🥊] "Your best monster friend accidentally spilled explosive acid." bot. I had some personal problems and had to solve them myself. And currently, I have lost my progress on the two bots I was supposed to make, but they will come at one point. Anyway, thanks for reading. And have a good day, my stars!

-Moviee-
